race.comment: The feature race now and SMOOTH CHINO (9) looks the one to beat following a return to form in the Northam Stakes last time out. This looks to shape favourably from an inside draw and the rise to 1400m doesn't look an issue on what he did last start. Can bring up back-to-back wins. WESTERN EMPIRE (1) has trialled very impressively coming into this, though he can take a run to get going as he did last time in work. He draws well for his return today however and should be in a stalking role just off SMOOTH CHINO. He's a grand old horse who can make a statement on his return. DIAMOND SCENE (5) boasts a strong first-up record and won a similar race to this first-up last campaign. Only one trial coming in, but he was good there and and he can turn in a bold effort on resumption. MAGNIFICENT ANDY (2) gets one more chance in a race that looks to set up nicely for him. Draws a gate now getting up in trip and he can improve. ROPE THEM IN (3) will be launching late getting up to 1400m.
